data.body: Fixed in d3ece706. verify_completion now runs the child-closure check as a DETERMINISTIC GATE before the LLM: enumerates direct children via list_tickets(parent=…) (parent_id hierarchy, not codebase alias search), checks each is closed+certified, and on any failure returns _deterministic_child_failure (FAIL, runner='deterministic') WITHOUT invoking the LLM. The LLM is only reached once children are all closed+signed and judges only the ticket's own criteria (instructions now forbid re-checking child closure/existence/signing). Cost is child-count-independent. New test test_child_closure_gate_short_circuits_before_llm asserts a boom-runner is never called on a failing-child gate and IS reached once children clear; existing test_child_closure_trust still passes; 44 completion tests + 75 LLM-suite green. docs/llm-framework.md updated.
